name: Our Payroll FICA Tax Credit Calculation Process Explained — Buffalo

step.name: Step 1: Fica claim process
step.text: Fica claim process — FICA Tax Credits & Refunds walks you through our Payroll FICA Tax Credit Calculation fica claim process in Buffalo. A compliance-first tax consultancy service helping restaurants, bars and nightclubs CPA/accountants learn how to gain tax credits and refunds. We specialize in leveraging federal programs to capture tax credits and maximize FICA tax refunds for the past 3 years to increase profitability for businesses. Get exact numbers the IRS owes you at no charge. No fees unless you receive a refund, only then do we charge a small percentage of that refund/credit you receive.
